title: Measurement triggering based on data traffic
abstract: Embodiments include methods for a UE to perform measurements in a wireless network based on conditions related to data traffic. Such methods include receiving, from a network node of the wireless network, one or more conditional measurement configurations, each including: a measurement configuration associated with one or more cells, and one or more measurement conditions that need to be fulfilled to apply the measurement configuration, including at least one first execution condition related to UE data traffic and/or one or more UE applications. Such methods include monitoring for the measurement conditions included in the respective conditional measurement configurations and, based on detecting fulfillment of one or more measurement conditions included in a particular conditional measurement configuration, applying the measurement configuration included in the particular conditional measurement configuration towards measurements of the associated cells. Other embodiments include complementary methods for a network node, as well as UEs and network nodes.
claims:
Claims 1. A method for a user equipment, UE, to perform measurements in a wireless network based on conditions related to data traffic, the method comprising: receiving (2510), from a network node of the wireless network, one or more conditional measurement configurations, each conditional measurement configuration including: a measurement configuration associated with one or more cells, and one or more measurement conditions that need to be fulfilled to apply the measurement configuration, including at least one first measurement condition related to one or more of the following: UE data traffic, and one or more UE applications; monitoring (2530) for the measurement conditions included in the respective conditional measurement configurations; and based on detecting fulfillment of one or more measurement conditions included in a particular one of the conditional measurement configurations, applying (2540) the measurement configuration included in the particular conditional measurement configuration towards measurements of the associated one or more cells. 2. The method of claim 1, further comprising storing (2520) the conditional measurement configurations. 3. The method of any of claims 1-2, wherein monitoring (2530) for the measurement conditions comprises: calculating (2531) UE data traffic volume; and comparing (2532) the calculated data traffic volume to one or more first criteria associated with the respective first measurement conditions. 4. The method of claim 3, wherein calculating (2531) UE data traffic volume comprises determining raw measurements of data traffic volume and applying a smoothing filter to the raw measurements to produce the calculated data traffic volume. 5. The method of any of claims 3-4, wherein monitoring (2530) for the measurement conditions further comprises determining (2533) that the calculated data traffic volume fulfills the one or more first criteria during at least a triggering delay, TTT. 6. The method of any of claims 1-5, wherein the one or more measurement conditions, included in each conditional measurement configuration, also include at least one second measurement condition related to measurements of the UEâs serving cell. 7. The method of claim 6, wherein monitoring (2530) for the measurement conditions further comprises: performing (2534) signal measurements based on at least one measurement object associated with the conditional measurement configurations; and comparing (2535) the signal measurements to one or more second criteria associated with the respective second measurement conditions. 8. The method of any of claims 6-7, wherein the respective second measurement conditions include any of the following: measured signal level and/or quality for a serving cell, carrier, or radio access technology, RAT, is below a first measurement threshold; measured signal level and/or quality for the serving cell, carrier, or RAT is above a second measurement threshold; and measured signal level and/or quality for the serving cell, carrier, or RAT is between the first and second measurement thresholds. 9. The method of any of claims 6-8, wherein applying (2540) the measurement configuration included in the particular conditional measurement configuration is based on detecting fulfillment of one of the following included in the particular conditional measurement configuration: both a first measurement condition and a second measurement condition; or either a first measurement condition or a second measurement condition. 10. The method of any of claims 6-9, wherein one of the following applies: monitoring (2530) for a first measurement condition included in the particular conditional measurement configuration is initiated based on detecting fulfillment of a second measurement condition included in the particular conditional measurement configuration; or 

 monitoring (2530) for a second measurement condition included in the particular conditional measurement configuration is initiated based on detecting fulfillment of a first measurement condition included in the particular conditional measurement configuration. 11. The method of any of claims 1-10, wherein the at least one first measurement condition includes one or more of the following: a particular UE application is activated; a particular UE application is deactivated; a particular UE application reaches a particular state; or a particular UE application triggers a particular event. 12. The method of any of claims 1-11, wherein monitoring (2530) for the measurement conditions comprises monitoring (2536) for an indication, from the network node, that at least one first measurement condition related to UE downlink, DL, data traffic has been fulfilled. 13. The method of claim 12, wherein one or more of the following applies: the indication, when received, is a MAC control element, MAC CE; a radio resource control, RRC, message; or downlink control information, DCI; and the indication, when received, includes an identifier of the particular conditional measurement configuration whose at least one first measurement condition related to UE DL data traffic has been fulfilled. 14. The method of any of claims 1-13, wherein applying (2540) the measurement configuration included in the particular conditional measurement configuration includes performing one or more of the following operations based on the measurement configuration: initiating (2541) measurements on one or more target cells; initiating (2542) reporting of measurements made on the one or more target cells; stopping or suspending (2543) ongoing measurements on the one or more target cells; stopping or suspending (2544) ongoing reporting of measurements made on the one or more target cells; releasing (2545) the measurement configuration. 15. The method of claim 14, wherein: 

 at least one of the conditional measurement configurations includes a plurality of first measurement conditions; and each first measurement condition is related to a different one of the operations. 16. The method of claim 15, wherein monitoring (2530) for the measurement conditions comprises, after detecting fulfillment of a particular first measurement condition related to initiating measurements or reporting of measurements, monitoring (2537) for a further first measurement condition related to stopping or suspending ongoing measurements or ongoing reporting of measurements. 17. The method of any of claims 1-16, wherein the UE is operating in one of the following modes: single connectivity with the network node; dual connectivity where the network node is a master node, MN; or dual connectivity where the network node is a secondary node, SN. 18. The method of any of claim 1-17, wherein the first measurement conditions, included in the respective conditional measurement configurations, include any of the following criteria, individually or in any combination: calculated or measured uplink, UL, data traffic volume is above or below an UL data volume threshold; calculated or measured UL throughput is above or below an UL throughput threshold; calculated or measured downlink, DL, data traffic volume is above or below a DL data volume threshold; calculated or measured DL throughput is above or below a DL throughput threshold; arrival of UL data; and arrival of DL data. 19. The method of claim 18, wherein each of the criteria is related to one of the following: all UE UL or DL data traffic; UE UL or DL data traffic associated with a specific radio bearer; or UE UL or DL data traffic associated with a specific group of radio bearers with a specific quality of service, QoS, profile. 20. A method, for a network node of a wireless network, to configure measurements by a user equipment, UE, based on conditions related to data traffic, the method comprising: 

 transmitting (2610), to the UE, one or more conditional measurement configurations, each conditional measurement configuration including: a measurement configuration associated with one or more cells, and one or more measurement conditions that need to be fulfilled for the UE to apply the measurement configuration, including at least one first measurement condition related to one or more of the following: UE data traffic, and one or more UE applications. 21. The method of claim 20, further comprising receiving (2640), from the UE, a measurement report including measurements of one or more cells associated with a measurement configuration included in a particular one of the conditional measurement configurations, based on fulfillment of the one or more measurement conditions included in the particular conditional measurement configuration. 22. The method of any of claims 20-21, further comprising: monitoring (2620) for first measurement conditions related to UE downlink (DL) data traffic; and based on detecting fulfillment of at least one first measurement condition related to UE DL data traffic, sending (2630) to the UE an indication that the at least one first measurement condition has been fulfilled. 23. The method of claim 22, wherein one or more of following applies: the indication is sent as a MAC control element, MAC CE; a radio resource control, RRC, message; or downlink control information, DCI; and the indication includes an identifier of the particular conditional measurement configuration whose at least one first measurement condition related to UE DL data traffic has been fulfilled. 24. The method of any of claims 20-23, wherein the one or more measurement conditions, included in each conditional measurement configuration, also include at least one second measurement condition related to measurements of the UEâs serving cell. 25. The method of claim 24, wherein the respective second measurement conditions include any of the following: 

 measured signal level and/or quality for a serving cell, carrier, or radio access technology, RAT, is below a first measurement threshold; measured signal level and/or quality for the serving cell, carrier, or RAT is above a second measurement threshold; and measured signal level and/or quality for the serving cell, carrier, or RAT is between the first and second measurement thresholds. 26. The method of any of claims 24-25, wherein a particular one of the conditional measurement configurations requires fulfillment of one of the following for the UE to apply the measurement configuration included in the particular conditional measurement configuration: both a first measurement condition and a second measurement condition; or either a first measurement condition or a second measurement condition. 27. The method of any of claims 24-26, wherein a particular one of the conditional measurement configurations requires one of the following for the UE to apply the measurement configuration included in the particular conditional measurement configuration: fulfillment of a second measurement condition after fulfillment of a first measurement condition; or fulfillment of a first measurement condition after fulfillment of a second measurement condition. 28. The method of any of claims 20-27, wherein the at least one first measurement condition includes one or more of the following: a particular UE application is activated; a particular UE application is deactivated; a particular UE application reaches a particular state; or a particular UE application triggers a particular event. 29. The method of any of claims 20-28, wherein each conditional measurement configuration indicates that the UE should apply the included measurement configuration when performing one or more of the following operations: initiating measurements on one or more target cells; initiating reporting of measurements made on the one or more target cells; stopping or suspending ongoing measurements on the one or more target cells; 

 stopping or suspending ongoing reporting of measurements made on the one or more target cells; and releasing the measurement configuration. 30. The method of claim 29, wherein: at least one of the conditional measurement configurations includes a plurality of first measurement conditions; and each first measurement condition is related to a different one of the operations. 31. The method of any of claims 20-30, wherein the network node is operating in one of the following modes with respect to the UE: single connectivity; dual connectivity where the network node is a master node, MN; or dual connectivity where the network node is a secondary node, SN. 32. The method of any of claim 20-31, wherein the first measurement conditions, included in the respective conditional measurement configurations, include any of the following criteria, individually or in any combination: calculated or measured uplink, UL, data traffic volume is above or below an UL data volume threshold; calculated or measured UL throughput is above or below an UL throughput threshold; calculated or measured downlink, DL, data traffic volume is above or below a DL data volume threshold; calculated or measured DL throughput is above or below a DL throughput threshold; arrival of UL data; and arrival of DL data. 33. The method of claim 32, wherein each of the criteria is related to one of the following: all UE UL or DL data traffic; UE UL or DL data traffic associated with a specific radio bearer; or UE UL or DL data traffic associated with a specific group of radio bearers with a specific quality of service, QoS, profile. 34. A user equipment, UE (120, 605, 705, 1410, 1810, 1910, 2710, 2800, 3130) configured to perform measurements in a wireless network (100, 699, 799) based on conditions related to data traffic, the UE comprising: 

 communication interface circuitry (2714, 2809, 2811, 2831, 3137) configured to communicate with a network node (105, 110, 115, 610, 620, 710, 720, 1420, 1430, 1820, 1830, 1920, 2760, 2930, 3120) of the wireless network; and processing circuitry (2720, 2800, 3138) operatively coupled to the communication interface circuitry, whereby the processing circuitry and the communication interface circuitry are configured to: receive, from a network node of the wireless network, one or more conditional measurement configurations, each conditional measurement configuration including: a measurement configuration associated with one or more cells, and one or more measurement conditions that need to be fulfilled to apply the measurement configuration, including at least one first measurement condition related to one or more of the following: UE data traffic, and one or more UE applications; monitor for the measurement conditions included in the respective conditional measurement configurations; and based on detecting fulfillment of one or more measurement conditions included in a particular one of the conditional measurement configurations, apply the measurement configuration included in the particular conditional measurement configuration towards measurements of the associated one or more cells. 35. The UE of claim 34, wherein the processing circuitry and the communication interface circuitry are further configured to perform operations corresponding to any of the methods of claims 2-19. 36. A user equipment, UE (120, 605, 705, 1410, 1810, 1910, 2710, 2800, 3130) configured to perform measurements in a wireless network (100, 699, 799) based on conditions related to data traffic, the UE being further configured to: receive, from a network node of the wireless network, one or more conditional measurement configurations, each conditional measurement configuration including: a measurement configuration associated with one or more cells, and one or more measurement conditions that need to be fulfilled to apply the measurement configuration, including at least one first measurement 

 condition related to one or more of the following: UE data traffic, and one or more UE applications; monitor for the measurement conditions included in the respective conditional measurement configurations; and based on detecting fulfillment of one or more measurement conditions included in a particular one of the conditional measurement configurations, apply the measurement configuration included in the particular conditional measurement configuration towards measurements of the associated one or more cells. 37. The UE of claim 36, being further configured to perform operations corresponding to any of the methods of claims 2-19. 38. A non-transitory, computer-readable medium (2730, 2821) storing computer-executable instructions that, when executed by processing circuitry (2720, 2800, 3138) of a user equipment, UE (120, 605, 705, 1410, 1810, 1910, 2710, 2800, 3130) arranged to perform measurements in a wireless network (100, 699, 799) based on conditions related to data traffic, configure the UE to perform operations corresponding to any of the methods of claims 1-19. 39. A computer program product (2825, 3131) comprising computer-executable instructions that, when executed by processing circuitry (2720, 2800, 3138) of a user equipment, UE (120, 605, 705, 1410, 1810, 1910, 2710, 2800, 3130) arranged to perform measurements in a wireless network (100, 699, 799) based on conditions related to data traffic, configure the UE to perform operations corresponding to any of the methods of claims 1-19. 40. A network node (105, 110, 115, 610, 620, 710, 720, 1420, 1430, 1820, 1830, 1920, 2760, 2930, 3120), of a wireless network (100, 699, 799), arranged to configure measurements by a user equipment, UE (120, 605, 705, 1410, 1810, 1910, 2710, 2800, 3130) based on conditions related to data traffic, the network node comprising: communication interface circuitry (2790, 2970, 29200, 3127) configured to communicate with the UE; and processing circuitry (2770, 2960, 3128) operatively coupled to the communication interface circuitry, whereby the processing circuitry and the communication interface circuitry are configured to: transmit, to the UE, one or more conditional measurement configurations, each including: 

 a measurement configuration associated with one or more cells, and one or more measurement conditions that need to be fulfilled for the UE to apply the measurement configuration, including at least one first execution condition related to one or more of the following: UE data traffic, and one or more UE applications. 41. The network node of claim 40, wherein the processing circuitry and the communication interface circuitry are further configured to perform operations corresponding to any of the methods of claims 21-33. 42. A network node (105, 110, 115, 610, 620, 710, 720, 1420, 1430, 1820, 1830, 1920, 2760, 2930, 3120), of a wireless network (100, 699, 799), arranged to configure measurements by a user equipment, UE (120, 605, 705, 1410, 1810, 1910, 2710, 2800, 3130) based on conditions related to data traffic, the network node being further arranged to: transmit, to the UE, one or more conditional measurement configurations, each including: a measurement configuration associated with one or more cells, and one or more measurement conditions that need to be fulfilled for the UE to apply the measurement configuration, including at least one first execution condition related to one or more of the following: UE data traffic, and one or more UE applications. 43. The network node of claim 42, being further arranged to perform operations corresponding to any of the methods of claims 21-33. 44. A non-transitory, computer-readable medium (2780, 2990) storing computer-executable instructions that, when executed by processing circuitry (2770, 2960, 3128) of a network node (105, 110, 115, 610, 620, 710, 720, 1420, 1430, 1820, 1830, 1920, 2760, 2930, 3120) arranged to configure measurements by a user equipment, UE (120, 605, 705, 1410, 1810, 1910, 2710, 2800, 3130) based on conditions related to data traffic, configure the network node to perform operations corresponding to any of the methods of claims 20-33. 45. A computer program product (2995, 3121) comprising computer-executable instructions that, when executed by processing circuitry (2770, 2960, 3128) of a network node (105, 110, 115, 610, 620, 710, 720, 1420, 1430, 1820, 1830, 1920, 2760, 2930, 3120) arranged to configure 

measurements by a user equipment, UE (120, 605, 705, 1410, 1810, 1910, 2710, 2800, 3130) based on conditions related to data traffic, configure the network node to perform operations corresponding to any of the methods of claims 20-33.
